title: [codereview-pass-1] draft-lichen-schc-lora-00.md:4 Rule overlap risk between RPL rules and ICMP rule 2; MO must be specific enough to avoid decompression errors P0
description: With ICMP rule 2 for Echo (types 128/129) and rules 3/4 for type 155, but if a rule matching falls through incorrectly due to similar IPv6 base, packets may use wrong decompression. Ensure rule applicability is mutually exclusive with strict MO on NextHeader/Type/Code. Critical for correctness. Reference RFC 8724 rule selection algorithm.
close_reason: Rule overlap risk fixed with MO specificity documentation per RFC 8724; 3 codereview passes completed with only P3/P4 findings filed and closed
